title: Rye Fry Delight
description: A festive German dish featuring gluten-free rye and light frying technique for a salty and festive snack.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Brush the rye bread slice with vegetable oil or avocado oil, ensuring it's evenly coated.
Add the minced garlic to the heated pan and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Gently place the greased side of the rye bread in the skillet. Allow it to cook for about 2-3 minutes on one side without moving.
Flip the rye bread and season with a pinch of salt. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from heat, let cool slightly before serving.
